title: [3～4]다음 밑줄 친 부분과 의미가 비슷한 것을 고르십시오. (각 2점)

content.q_text: 어제 본 공연은 눈물이 <u>날 정도로</u> 감동적이었다.

explain.vi:
Buổi biểu diễn tôi xem tối qua cảm động <u>đến mức rơi</u> nước mắt. 
1. Tới mức rơi
2. Sợ rằng rơi
3. Cứ như rơi
4. Thay vì rơi
--------------------
V + (으)ㄹ 만큼: Đến mức, tới mức.
V + 는 대로: Như, cứ như, theo như. 
V + (으)ㄹ 까봐: Sợ rằng, lo rằng, e rằng.
V + 는 대신에: Thay vì, thay cho
explain.en:
The performance I saw last night was so moving <u>that it brought<u> tears to my eyes.
1. Enough to burst into (tears)
2. Maybe shedding (tears)
3. Like shedding (tears)
4. Instead of bursting into (tears)
--------------------
<g>V + (으)ㄹ 만큼:</g> As much as, like.
<g>V + 는 대로:</g> Based on, just as expected, as soon as.
<g>V + (으)ㄹ 까봐:</g> Be worried/afraid that.
<g>V + 는 대신에:</g> Instead of.
explain.fr:
La performance que j'ai vue hier soir était si émouvante <u>qu'elle m'a fait monter les larmes aux yeux.
1. Assez pour éclater en (larmes)
2. Peut-être verser (des larmes)
3. Comme verser (des larmes)
4. Au lieu d'éclater en (larmes)
--------------------
<g>V + (으)ㄹ 만큼:</g>Autant que, comme.
<g>V + 는 대로:</g>Basé sur, comme prévu, dès que.
<g>V + (으)ㄹ 까봐:</g>Soyez inquiet/craignez cela.
<g>V + 는 대신에:</g>À la place de.

<g>V + (으)ㄹ 까봐:</g>Estar preocupado/asustado de eso.
<g>V + 는 대신에:</g>En vez de.

title: [3～4]다음 밑줄 친 부분과 의미가 비슷한 것을 고르십시오. (각 2점)

content.q_text: 두 사람은 오랫동안 알고 지냈지만 직장 동료 <u>사이일 뿐이다</u>.

explain.vi:
Hai người họ quen biết đã lâu nhưng <u>chỉ là quan hệ</u> đồng nghiệp. 
1. Không vượt quá mối quan hệ (đồng nghiệp)
2. Nếu là quan hệ (đồng nghiệp) thì tốt
3. Không biết có phải là mối quan hệ (đồng nghiệp) hay không
4. Không thể xem là mối quan hệ (đồng nghiệp)
--------------------
N + 에 불과하다: Không vượt quá.
V/A + (으)ㄹ 지도 모르다: Không biết chừng.
N + (이)라고 볼 수 없다: Không thể xem như là.
explain.en:
The two of them have known each other for a long time, but their relationship <u>is just colleague relationship.</u>
1. Beyond the colleague relationship
2. It would be nice if their relationship is colleague relationship
3. Don't know if their relationship is colleague relationship or not
4. Can't be considered as a colleague relationship
--------------------
<g>N + 에 불과하다:</g> The state does not exceed a certain degree or level.
<g>V/A + (으)ㄹ 지도 모르다:</g> Might, may.
<g>N + 라고 볼 수 없다:</g> Cannot be considered as.
explain.fr:
Les deux se connaissent depuis longtemps, mais leur relation <u>n'est qu'une relation de collègue.</u>
1. Au-delà de la relation collègue
2. Ce serait bien si leur relation était une relation de collègue
3. Je ne sais pas si leur relation est une relation de collègue ou non
4. Ne peut pas être considéré comme une relation de collègue
--------------------
<g>N + 에 불과하다:</g>L'état ne dépasse pas un certain degré ou niveau.
<g>V/A + (으)ㄹ 지도 모르다:</g>Peut, peut.
<g>N + 라고 볼 수 없다:</g>Ne peut être considéré comme.

#######

The two of them have known each other for a long time, but their relationship <u>is just colleague relationship.</u>
1. Beyond the colleague relationship
2. It would be nice if their relationship is colleague relationship
3. Don't know if their relationship is colleague relationship or not
4. Can't be considered as a colleague relationship
--------------------
<g>N + 에 불과하다:</g> The state does not exceed a certain degree or level.
<g>V/A + (으)ㄹ 지도 모르다:</g> Might, may.
<g>N + 라고 볼 수 없다:</g> Cannot be considered as.
explain.es:
Los dos se conocen desde hace mucho tiempo, pero su relación <u>es solo una relación de colegas.</u>
1. Más allá de la relación colega
2. Sería bueno si su relación es una relación de colega
3. No sé si su relación es una relación de colega o no.
4. No se puede considerar como una relación de colega
--------------------
<g>N + 에 불과하다:</g>El estado no supera un determinado grado o nivel.
<g>V/A + (으)ㄹ 지도 모르다:</g>Podría puedo.
<g>N + 라고 볼 수 없다:</g>No se puede considerar como.

#######

The two of them have known each other for a long time, but their relationship <u>is just colleague relationship.</u>
1. Beyond the colleague relationship
2. It would be nice if their relationship is colleague relationship
3. Don't know if their relationship is colleague relationship or not
4. Can't be considered as a colleague relationship
--------------------
<g>N + 에 불과하다:</g> The state does not exceed a certain degree or level.
<g>V/A + (으)ㄹ 지도 모르다:</g> Might, may.
<g>N + 라고 볼 수 없다:</g> Cannot be considered as.
explain.id:
Mereka berdua sudah saling kenal untuk waktu yang lama, tetapi hubungan mereka <u>hanyalah hubungan rekan kerja.</u>
1. Di luar hubungan rekan kerja
2. Alangkah baiknya jika hubungan mereka adalah hubungan rekan kerja
3. Tidak tahu apakah hubungan mereka adalah hubungan rekan kerja atau tidak
4. Tidak dapat dianggap sebagai hubungan rekan kerja
--------------------
<g>N + 에 불과하다:</g>Negara tidak melebihi derajat atau tingkat tertentu.
<g>V/A + (으)ㄹ 지도 모르다:</g>Mungkin bisa.
<g>N + 라고 볼 수 없다:</g>Tidak dapat dianggap sebagai.

#######

The two of them have known each other for a long time, but their relationship <u>is just colleague relationship.</u>
1. Beyond the colleague relationship
2. It would be nice if their relationship is colleague relationship
3. Don't know if their relationship is colleague relationship or not
4. Can't be considered as a colleague relationship
--------------------
<g>N + 에 불과하다:</g> The state does not exceed a certain degree or level.
<g>V/A + (으)ㄹ 지도 모르다:</g> Might, may.
<g>N + 라고 볼 수 없다:</g> Cannot be considered as.

content.q_text: 먹구름이 몰려오는 걸 보니 비가 <u>올 모양이다</u>.

explain.vi:

4. Chưa từng đến
--------------------
먹구름: Mây đen

V + 기도 하다: Làm cả.
V + (으)ㄹ 것 같다: Có vẻ, có lẽ.
V + (으)ㄹ 리가 없다: Không có lý nào lại.
V + (으)ㄴ 적이 있다/없다: Đã/chưa từng làm gì.

3. There's no way it's going to (rain)
4. It has never (rained)
--------------------

<g>V + (으)ㄴ 적이 있다/없다:</g> To have/to not have done something before.

content.q_text: 다른 옷가게에 <u>가 봐야</u> 값은 여기와 비슷할 것이다.

explain.vi:
<u>Dù có đi</u> tới cửa hàng quần áo khác thì giá cũng sẽ giống ở đây thôi.

2. Đã đi thì sẽ không
3. Tới rồi không biết chừng
4. Đi nhưng
--------------------
V + 아/어 봐야: Dù có thì.
V + (으)ㄴ다고 해도: Dù có ... thì cũng.
V + ㄴ/는다고 치다, A + 다고 치다: Cứ cho là, ngay cả khi, kể cả khi.
V + (으)ㄹ지도 모르다: Không biết chừng, không biết là.
V + 기는 하지만: Cũng có ... nhưng mà.

<g>V + (으)ㄹ지도 모르다:</g> Might, may.
<g>V + 기는 하지만:</g> But (I think).

explain.vi:

V + 는 듯하다: Có vẻ, như thể.
V + 는 편이다: Thuộc dạng, thuộc loại.
V + 기 마련이다: Đương nhiên, chắc chắn.
explain.en:

<g>V/A + 기 마련이다:</g> It’s expected that…, that’s the way it is, it’s always like that.

explain.tr:

3. Bilmemeniz gereken çadır
4. Bilmeyeceğim
--------------------

<g>V + 는 듯하다, A + (으)ㄴ 듯하다:</g>Böyle görünmek (ses çıkarmak).
<g>V + 는 편이다, A + (으)ㄴ 편이다</g>: Yerine<g>A</g>, eğilimi<g>V</g>...(normalden daha).
<g>V/A + 기 마련이다:</g>Beklenen…, bu böyledir, bu hep böyledir.

#######

2. Didn't seem to know
3. Tent to not know
4. Am bound to not know

<g>A/V + (으)ㄴ/는 체하다:</g> Pretend to.

<g>V + 는 편이다, A + (으)ㄴ 편이다</g>: Rather <g>A</g>, tend to <g>V</g>...(than usual). 
<g>V/A + 기 마련이다:</g> It’s expected that…, that’s the way it is, it’s always like that.

content.q_text: 한국어 실력을  <u>늘리고자</u> 한국 신문과 방송을 자주 봤다.

explain.vi:

1. Để nâng cao
2. Ngay khi nâng cao
3. Thay vì nâng cao
4. Trái lại nâng cao
--------------------
V + 기 위해서: Để làm gì.
V + 기무섭게: Ngay khi.
V + 는 대신에: Thay vì, thay cho.
V + 는 반면에: Trái lại.
explain.en:
I often read Korean newspapers <u>to improve</u> my Korean ability.
1. To improve
2. As soon as I improved
3. Instead of improving
4. While improving
--------------------
<g>V + 기 위해(서)</g>: For (the sake of), (in order) to.
<g>V + 기무섭게:</g> Right after, as soon as.
<g>V + 는 대신에:</g> Instead of.
<g>A/V + (으)ㄴ/는 + 반면에:</g> But, while.

content.q_text: 이 컴퓨터는 낡아서 <u>수리해 봐야</u> 오래 쓰기 어렵다.

explain.vi:

--------------------
V/A + 아/어 봐야: Dù làm gì đó thì kết quả cũng không như kỳ vọng.
V + 어/아 보니까: Làm gì đó thì.
V + 는 대로: Ngay khi.
V + 는 바람에: Vì, do, bởi ... nên.
V + ㄴ/는다고 해도, A + 다고 해도: Dù làm gì thì cũng có thể xuất hiện kết quả trái ngược dự đoán.
explain.en:

3. Because it's repaired
4. Even if it's repaired

<g>V + ㄴ/는다고 해도, A + 다고 해도:</g> Regardless of doing anything, there will be a result contrasted to the expectation.

V/A + (으)ㄹ 리가 없다: Không lý nào, không thể nào.

title: [9～12]다음 글 또는 도표의 내용과 같은 것을 고르십시오.(각 2점).

content.q_text: 올해 태어난 아기는 몇 살까지 살 수 있을까? 통계청에서 한국인의 기대 수명을 10년 단위로 예측한 결과, 2000년의 기대 수명은 76세, 2010년은 81.2세, 2020년은 87.4세로 예측되었다. 2000년에 태어난 아기들은 평균 76세까지 살 수 있다는 것이다. 그런데 기대 수명은 성인이 되기 전에 사망하는 아이의 경우까지 포함해 계산한 것이다. 따라서 실제로 어른이 된 사람의 기대 수명은 예측한 것보다 훨씬 길다.
q_answer: 통계청은 기대 수명을 5년에 한 번씩 조사하였다.
기대 수명은 사람들이 실제로 산 나이의 평균이다.
어른의 경우 기대 수명보다 오래 사는 사람들이 많다.
오래 살고 싶어하는 사람들이 많아 기대 수명이 길어진다.

explain.vi:
Đứa trẻ được sinh ra trong năm nay có thể sống đến bao nhiêu tuổi? Theo kết quả tuổi thọ kỳ vọng của người Hàn Quốc theo đơn vị 10 năm của Cục Thống kê Quốc gia, tuổi thọ kỳ vọng của năm 2000 được dự đoán là 76 tuổi, năm 2010 là 81,2 tuổi và năm 2020 là 87,4 tuổi. Trẻ sinh năm 2000 có thể sống đến 76 tuổi. Tuy nhiên, tuổi thọ được tính bao gồm cả trường hợp trẻ em chết trước khi đến tuổi trưởng thành. Vì vậy, trên thực tế, tuổi thọ của một người trưởng thành dài hơn nhiều so với dự đoán.
1. Cục Thống kê Quốc gia đã điều tra tuổi thọ kỳ vọng 5 năm một lần. 
2. Tuổi thọ kỳ vọng là trung bình của độ tuổi mà mọi người thực sự sống. 
3. Với người trưởng thành, có nhiều người sống lâu hơn tuổi thọ kỳ vọng. 
4. Có nhiều người muốn sống lâu nên tuổi thọ kỳ vọng tăng lên.
--------------------
Tuổi thọ của một người trưởng thành dài hơn so với dự đoán, tức là họ sống lâu hơn tuổi thọ kỳ vọng. Như vậy 3 là đáp án đúng.
explain.en:
How old can babies born this year live? As a result of predicting the life expectancy of Koreans in 10-year units by the National Statistical Office, the life expectancy in 2000 is 76 years, the life expectancy in 2010 is 81.2 years, and the life expectancy in 2020 is 87.4 years. Babies born in 2000 can live to an average age of 76. However, life expectancy is calculated including the case of children who die before reaching adulthood. So, in reality, the life expectancy of an adult is much longer than predicted.
1. The National Statistical Office surveyed the life expectancy once every five years. 
2. Life expectancy is the average age at which people actually live. 
3. In the case of adults, there are many people who live longer than expected life expectancy. 
4. There are many people who want to live long, so the life expectancy is longer.
--------------------
An adult's life expectancy is longer than expected, i.e. they live longer than expected. So 3 is the correct answer.
explain.fr:
Quel âge les bébés nés cette année peuvent-ils vivre ? À la suite de la prévision de l'espérance de vie des Coréens en unités de 10 ans par l'Office national des statistiques, l'espérance de vie en 2000 est de 76 ans, l'espérance de vie en 2010 est de 81,2 ans et l'espérance de vie en 2020 est de 87,4 ans. Les bébés nés en 2000 peuvent vivre jusqu'à 76 ans en moyenne. Cependant, l'espérance de vie est calculée en incluant le cas des enfants qui meurent avant d'avoir atteint l'âge adulte. Ainsi, en réalité, l'espérance de vie d'un adulte est beaucoup plus longue que prévu.
1. L'Office national des statistiques a enquêté sur l'espérance de vie une fois tous les cinq ans.
2. L'espérance de vie est l'âge moyen auquel les gens vivent réellement.
3. Dans le cas des adultes, de nombreuses personnes vivent plus longtemps que prévu.
4. Il y a beaucoup de gens qui veulent vivre longtemps, donc l'espérance de vie est plus longue.
--------------------
L'espérance de vie d'un adulte est plus longue que prévu, c'est-à-dire qu'il vit plus longtemps que prévu. Donc 3 est la bonne réponse.

#######

How old can babies born this year live? As a result of predicting the life expectancy of Koreans in 10-year units by the National Statistical Office, the life expectancy in 2000 is 76 years, the life expectancy in 2010 is 81.2 years, and the life expectancy in 2020 is 87.4 years. Babies born in 2000 can live to an average age of 76. However, life expectancy is calculated including the case of children who die before reaching adulthood. So, in reality, the life expectancy of an adult is much longer than predicted.
1. The National Statistical Office surveyed the life expectancy once every five years. 
2. Life expectancy is the average age at which people actually live. 
3. In the case of adults, there are many people who live longer than expected life expectancy. 
4. There are many people who want to live long, so the life expectancy is longer.
--------------------
An adult's life expectancy is longer than expected, i.e. they live longer than expected. So 3 is the correct answer.
explain.es:
¿Qué edad pueden vivir los bebés nacidos este año? Como resultado de la predicción de la esperanza de vida de los coreanos en unidades de 10 años por parte de la Oficina Nacional de Estadística, la esperanza de vida en 2000 es de 76 años, la esperanza de vida en 2010 es de 81,2 años y la esperanza de vida en 2020 es de 87,4 años. Los bebés nacidos en el año 2000 pueden vivir hasta una edad media de 76 años. Sin embargo, la esperanza de vida se calcula incluyendo el caso de los niños que mueren antes de llegar a la edad adulta. Entonces, en realidad, la esperanza de vida de un adulto es mucho más larga de lo previsto.
1. La Oficina Nacional de Estadística encuestó la esperanza de vida una vez cada cinco años.
2. La esperanza de vida es la edad media a la que vive realmente la gente.
3. En el caso de los adultos, hay muchas personas que viven más de lo esperado.
4. Hay muchas personas que quieren vivir mucho tiempo, por lo que la esperanza de vida es más larga.
--------------------
La esperanza de vida de un adulto es más larga de lo esperado, es decir, vive más de lo esperado. Entonces 3 es la respuesta correcta.

#######

How old can babies born this year live? As a result of predicting the life expectancy of Koreans in 10-year units by the National Statistical Office, the life expectancy in 2000 is 76 years, the life expectancy in 2010 is 81.2 years, and the life expectancy in 2020 is 87.4 years. Babies born in 2000 can live to an average age of 76. However, life expectancy is calculated including the case of children who die before reaching adulthood. So, in reality, the life expectancy of an adult is much longer than predicted.
1. The National Statistical Office surveyed the life expectancy once every five years. 
2. Life expectancy is the average age at which people actually live. 
3. In the case of adults, there are many people who live longer than expected life expectancy. 
4. There are many people who want to live long, so the life expectancy is longer.

An adult's life expectancy is longer than expected, i.e. they live longer than expected. So 3 is the correct answer.
explain.id:
Berapa umur bayi yang lahir tahun ini bisa hidup? Sebagai hasil dari prediksi harapan hidup orang Korea dalam satuan 10 tahun oleh Kantor Statistik Nasional, harapan hidup pada tahun 2000 adalah 76 tahun, harapan hidup pada tahun 2010 adalah 81,2 tahun, dan harapan hidup pada tahun 2020 adalah 87,4 tahun. Bayi yang lahir pada tahun 2000 dapat hidup rata-rata hingga usia 76 tahun. Namun, angka harapan hidup dihitung termasuk kasus anak yang meninggal sebelum mencapai usia dewasa. Jadi, pada kenyataannya, harapan hidup orang dewasa jauh lebih lama dari yang diperkirakan.
1. Kantor Statistik Nasional mensurvei angka harapan hidup setiap lima tahun sekali.
2. Harapan hidup adalah usia rata-rata di mana orang benar-benar hidup.
3. Dalam kasus orang dewasa, ada banyak orang yang hidup lebih lama dari harapan hidup yang diharapkan.
4. Banyak orang yang ingin panjang umur, agar harapan hidup lebih panjang.
--------------------
Harapan hidup orang dewasa lebih lama dari yang diharapkan, yaitu mereka hidup lebih lama dari yang diharapkan. Jadi 3 adalah jawaban yang benar.

#######

How old can babies born this year live? As a result of predicting the life expectancy of Koreans in 10-year units by the National Statistical Office, the life expectancy in 2000 is 76 years, the life expectancy in 2010 is 81.2 years, and the life expectancy in 2020 is 87.4 years. Babies born in 2000 can live to an average age of 76. However, life expectancy is calculated including the case of children who die before reaching adulthood. So, in reality, the life expectancy of an adult is much longer than predicted.

explain.hi:
इस वर्ष जन्म लेने वाले बच्चे कितने वर्ष तक जीवित रह सकते हैं? राष्ट्रीय सांख्यिकी कार्यालय द्वारा 10-वर्षीय इकाइयों में कोरियाई लोगों की जीवन प्रत्याशा की भविष्यवाणी के परिणामस्वरूप, 2000 में जीवन प्रत्याशा 76 वर्ष है, 2010 में जीवन प्रत्याशा 81.2 वर्ष है, और 2020 में जीवन प्रत्याशा 87.4 वर्ष है। 2000 में पैदा हुए बच्चे औसतन 76 वर्ष की आयु तक जीवित रह सकते हैं। हालाँकि, जीवन प्रत्याशा की गणना उन बच्चों के मामले को शामिल करके की जाती है जो वयस्क होने से पहले मर जाते हैं। तो, वास्तव में, एक वयस्क की जीवन प्रत्याशा अनुमान से कहीं अधिक लंबी होती है।
1. राष्ट्रीय सांख्यिकी कार्यालय ने हर पांच साल में एक बार जीवन प्रत्याशा का सर्वेक्षण किया।
2. जीवन प्रत्याशा वह औसत आयु है जिस पर लोग वास्तव में जीवित रहते हैं।
3. वयस्कों के मामले में, ऐसे कई लोग हैं जो अपेक्षित जीवन प्रत्याशा से अधिक समय तक जीवित रहते हैं।
4. ऐसे बहुत से लोग हैं जो लंबी उम्र जीना चाहते हैं, इसलिए जीवन प्रत्याशा लंबी होती है।
------------------------
एक वयस्क की जीवन प्रत्याशा अपेक्षा से अधिक लंबी होती है, अर्थात वे अपेक्षा से अधिक समय तक जीवित रहते हैं। अतः 3 सही उत्तर है।

explain.tr:
Bu yıl doğan bebekler kaç yaşında yaşayabilir? Ulusal İstatistik Ofisi'nin Korelilerin yaşam beklentisini 10 yıllık birimlerle tahmin etmesi sonucunda, 2000 yılında beklenen yaşam süresi 76 yıl, 2010 yılında beklenen yaşam süresi 81,2 yıl, 2020 yılında ise beklenen yaşam süresi 87,4 yıl oldu. 2000 yılında doğan bebekler ortalama 76 yaşına kadar yaşayabilmektedir. Ancak beklenen yaşam süresi, yetişkinliğe ulaşamadan ölen çocukların durumu da dahil edilerek hesaplanmaktadır. Yani gerçekte bir yetişkinin yaşam beklentisi tahmin edilenden çok daha uzundur.
1. Ulusal İstatistik Ofisi ortalama yaşam süresini beş yılda bir araştırıyordu.
2. Yaşam beklentisi, insanların gerçekte yaşadığı ortalama yaştır.
3. Yetişkinler söz konusu olduğunda, beklenen yaşam süresinden daha uzun yaşayan birçok insan vardır.
4. Uzun yaşamak isteyen birçok insan var, dolayısıyla yaşam beklentisi daha uzun.
--------------------
Bir yetişkinin yaşam beklentisi beklenenden daha uzundur, yani beklenenden daha uzun yaşarlar. Yani doğru cevap 3'tür.

title: [9～12]다음 글 또는 도표의 내용과 같은 것을 고르십시오.(각 2점).

content.q_text: 7월 21일부터 일주일 간 안동에서는 여러 나라의 탈춤을 감상할 수 있는 국제 탈춤 축제가 열린다. 2년 만에 다시 열리는 이번 축제에는 세계 각국의 탈춤 공연과 탈 전시회가 열리는 등 볼 것도 다양하다. 특히 이번 축제에서는 처음으로 탈춤 퍼레이드가 열린다. 관광객이 직접 탈을 쓰고 거리를 걸을 수 있어 큰 인기를 끌 것으로 예상된다.
q_answer: 외국의 탈춤 공연은 이번에 처음 열리는 공연이다.
탈춤 퍼레이드에는 관광객이 직접 참여할 수 있다.
이번 축제에서는 관광객이 만든 탈을 거리에 전시한다.

explain.vi:
Từ ngày 21/07, lễ hội múa mặt nạ quốc tế, nơi chúng ta có thể thưởng thức điệu nhảy mặt nạ của nhiều quốc gia, sẽ được tổ chức tại Andong trong một tuần. Lễ hội lần này được tổ chức lại sau 2 năm, có rất nhiều thứ để xem như biểu diễn múa mặt nạ và triển lãm mặt nạ của các quốc gia trên thế giới. Đặc biệt, lễ hội lần này là lần đầu tiên tổ chức diễu hành múa mặt nạ. Khách tham quan có thể trực tiếp đeo mặt nạ và đi bộ trên đường phố nên dự kiến sẽ lôi kéo được nhiều sự chú ý.
1. Lễ hội múa mặt nạ quốc tế được tổ chức hàng năm. 
2. Buổi biểu diễn múa mặt nạ nước ngoài được tổ chức lần này là lần đầu tiên. 
3. Khách tham quan có thể trực tiếp tham gia diễu hành múa mặt nạ. 
4. Lễ hội lần này trưng bày mặt nạ do khách tham quan làm trên đường phố.
--------------------
Khách tham quan có thể trực tiếp đeo mặt nạ và đi bộ trên đường phố, tức là có thể tham gia diễu hành. Vì vậy 3 là đáp án đúng.
explain.en:
From July 21st, the International Mask Dance Festival, where you can enjoy mask dances from different countries, will be held in Andong for a week. This festival, which is held again after two years, has various things to see, such as mask dance performances and mask exhibitions from around the world. In particular, the mask dance parade will be held for the first time in this festival. It is expected to be very popular with tourists as they can walk on the streets wearing masks themselves.
1. The international mask dance festival is held every year.
2. The foreign mask dance performance held this time is the first time.
3. Visitors can directly participate in the mask dance parade.
4. This festival displays masks made by visitors on the street.
--------------------
Visitors can directly wear masks and walk on the street, that is, they can participate in the parade. So 3 is the correct answer.
explain.fr:
À partir du 21 juillet, le festival international de danse masquée, où vous pourrez apprécier des danses masquées de différents pays, se tiendra à Andong pendant une semaine. Ce festival, qui se tient à nouveau après deux ans, propose diverses choses à voir, telles que des spectacles de danse de masques et des expositions de masques du monde entier. En particulier, le défilé de danse des masques aura lieu pour la première fois dans ce festival. On s'attend à ce qu'il soit très populaire auprès des touristes car ils peuvent se promener dans les rues en portant eux-mêmes des masques.
1. Le festival international de danse des masques a lieu chaque année.
2. Le spectacle de danse des masques étrangers organisé cette fois est la première fois.
3. Les visiteurs peuvent participer directement au défilé de danse masquée.
4. Ce festival présente des masques fabriqués par les visiteurs dans la rue.
--------------------
Les visiteurs peuvent directement porter des masques et marcher dans la rue, c'est-à-dire qu'ils peuvent participer au défilé. Donc 3 est la bonne réponse.

In particular, the mask dance parade will be held for the first time in this festival. It is expected to be very popular with tourists as they can walk on the streets wearing masks themselves.

explain.es:
A partir del 21 de julio, se llevará a cabo en Andong durante una semana el Festival Internacional de Danza de Máscaras, donde podrá disfrutar de danzas de máscaras de diferentes países. Este festival, que se vuelve a realizar después de dos años, tiene varias cosas para ver, como espectáculos de danza de máscaras y exhibiciones de máscaras de todo el mundo. En particular, el desfile de baile de máscaras se llevará a cabo por primera vez en este festival. Se espera que sea muy popular entre los turistas, ya que ellos mismos pueden caminar por las calles con máscaras.
1. El festival internacional de baile de máscaras se lleva a cabo todos los años.
2. El espectáculo de danza de máscaras extranjeras que se llevó a cabo esta vez es la primera vez.
3. Los visitantes pueden participar directamente en el desfile de baile de máscaras.
4. Este festival exhibe máscaras hechas por visitantes en la calle.
--------------------
Los visitantes pueden usar máscaras directamente y caminar por la calle, es decir, pueden participar en el desfile. Entonces 3 es la respuesta correcta.

С 21 июля в Андоне в течение недели будет проходить Международный фестиваль танцев в масках, на котором можно будет насладиться танцами в масках из разных стран. explain.th:
ตั้งแต่วันที่ 21 กรกฎาคม เทศกาลเต้นรำหน้ากากนานาชาติ ซึ่งคุณสามารถเพลิดเพลินกับการเต้นรำสวมหน้ากากจากประเทศต่างๆ จะจัดขึ้นที่อันดงเป็นเวลาหนึ่งสัปดาห์ เทศกาลนี้ซึ่งจัดขึ้นอีกครั้งหลังจากผ่านไปสองปี มีสิ่งต่างๆ มากมายให้ได้ชม เช่น การแสดงระบำหน้ากาก และนิทรรศการหน้ากากจากทั่วโลก โดยเฉพาะขบวนแห่รำหน้ากากจะจัดขึ้นเป็นครั้งแรกในเทศกาลนี้ คาดว่าจะได้รับความนิยมอย่างมากจากนักท่องเที่ยวเนื่องจากสามารถเดินบนถนนโดยสวมหน้ากากอนามัยได้ด้วยตนเอง
1. เทศกาลเต้นรำสวมหน้ากากนานาชาติจัดขึ้นทุกปี
2. การแสดงรำหน้ากากต่างชาติที่จัดขึ้นครั้งนี้เป็นครั้งแรก
3. ผู้เข้าชมสามารถเข้าร่วมขบวนแห่รำหน้ากากได้โดยตรง
4. เทศกาลนี้จัดแสดงหน้ากากที่ทำโดยผู้มาเยี่ยมชมบนท้องถนน
--------------------
ผู้เข้าชมสามารถสวมหน้ากากอนามัยและเดินบนถนนได้โดยตรง กล่าวคือ พวกเขาสามารถเข้าร่วมขบวนพาเหรดได้ ดังนั้น 3 คือคำตอบที่ถูกต้อง

explain.hi:
21 जुलाई से, अंतर्राष्ट्रीय मुखौटा नृत्य महोत्सव एक सप्ताह के लिए एंडोंग में आयोजित किया जाएगा, जहां आप विभिन्न देशों के मुखौटा नृत्यों का आनंद ले सकते हैं। दो साल बाद दोबारा आयोजित होने वाले इस महोत्सव में देखने के लिए कई चीजें होती हैं, जैसे दुनिया भर के मुखौटा नृत्य प्रदर्शन और मुखौटा प्रदर्शनियां। खास तौर पर इस महोत्सव में पहली बार मुखौटा नृत्य परेड का आयोजन किया जाएगा. इसके पर्यटकों के बीच काफी लोकप्रिय होने की उम्मीद है क्योंकि वे खुद मास्क पहनकर सड़कों पर चल सकेंगे।
1. अंतर्राष्ट्रीय मुखौटा नृत्य महोत्सव हर साल आयोजित किया जाता है।
2. इस बार आयोजित विदेशी मुखौटा नृत्य प्रदर्शन पहली बार है।
3. आगंतुक सीधे मुखौटा नृत्य परेड में भाग ले सकते हैं।
4. यह उत्सव सड़क पर आगंतुकों द्वारा बनाए गए मुखौटों को प्रदर्शित करता है।
------------------------
आगंतुक सीधे मास्क पहनकर सड़क पर चल सकते हैं, यानी परेड में हिस्सा ले सकते हैं. अतः 3 सही उत्तर है।

#######

From July 21st, the International Mask Dance Festival, where you can enjoy mask dances from different countries, will be held in Andong for a week. This festival, which is held again after two years, has various things to see, such as mask dance performances and mask exhibitions from around the world. In particular, the mask dance parade will be held for the first time in this festival. It is expected to be very popular with tourists as they can walk on the streets wearing masks themselves.
1. The international mask dance festival is held every year.
2. The foreign mask dance performance held this time is the first time.
3. Visitors can directly participate in the mask dance parade.
4. This festival displays masks made by visitors on the street.
--------------------
Visitors can directly wear masks and walk on the street, that is, they can participate in the parade. So 3 is the correct answer.
explain.tr:
Farklı ülkelerden maske danslarının keyfini çıkarabileceğiniz Uluslararası Maske Dans Festivali, 21 Temmuz'dan itibaren bir hafta boyunca Andong'da düzenlenecek. İki yıl aradan sonra yeniden düzenlenen bu festivalde maske dansı gösterileri, dünyanın dört bir yanından maske sergileri gibi görülecek çok şey var. Özellikle maske dansı geçit töreni ilk kez bu festivalde gerçekleştirilecek. Sokaklarda maske takarak dolaşabilen turistlerin de yoğun ilgi göstermesi bekleniyor.
1. Her yıl uluslararası maske dansı festivali düzenlenmektedir.
2. Bu kez düzenlenen yabancı maske dansı gösterisi ilk kez yapılıyor.
3. Ziyaretçiler maske dansı geçit törenine doğrudan katılabilirler.
4. Bu festivalde ziyaretçilerin sokakta yaptığı maskeler sergileniyor.
--------------------
Ziyaretçiler doğrudan maske takarak sokakta yürüyebiliyor, yani yürüyüşe katılabiliyor. Yani doğru cevap 3'tür.

#######

From July 21st, the International Mask Dance Festival, where you can enjoy mask dances from different countries, will be held in Andong for a week. This festival, which is held again after two years, has various things to see, such as mask dance performances and mask exhibitions from around the world. In particular, the mask dance parade will be held for the first time in this festival. It is expected to be very popular with tourists as they can walk on the streets wearing masks themselves.
1. The international mask dance festival is held every year.
2. The foreign mask dance performance held this time is the first time.
3. Visitors can directly participate in the mask dance parade.
4. This festival displays masks made by visitors on the street.
--------------------
Visitors can directly wear masks and walk on the street, that is, they can participate in the parade. So 3 is the correct answer.
